indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space allows for a wide range of movement and positioning during yoga and stretching.

indicators.name: Natural light from skylights
indicators.rationale: Natural light can enhance the mood and focus during yoga practice.

indicators.name: Hard flooring
indicators.rationale: Hard flooring may be uncomfortable for some individuals performing yoga and stretching.

reasoning_summary: The space is largely suitable for yoga and stretching due to its open layout and natural lighting, but the hard flooring could be a minor inconvenience.
